summary: Comprehensive testing of round-robin lead assignment and Pre-Sales → Sales transfer flow. All 11 tests passed (100% success rate).

refresh_distribution_teams.details: POST /api/marketing/distribution-settings/refresh successfully refreshes team lists. Pre-Sales: Kavitha Nair, Karthik Reddy. Sales: Ravi Sales, Divya Pillai.

get_distribution_settings.details: GET /api/marketing/distribution-settings returns current settings with team details, current indices, and enabled status.

round_robin_presales_assignment.details: CRE creates 4 leads - leads alternate correctly: Lead 1 → Kavitha Nair, Lead 2 → Karthik Reddy, Lead 3 → Kavitha Nair, Lead 4 → Karthik Reddy.

presales_to_sales_transfer.details: Pre-Sales lead moved to 'Appointment Booked' stage triggers automatic transfer to Sales CRM. New Sales lead created in 'New Appointment' stage with round-robin assignment to sales team.

sales_user_sees_leads.details: Sales user (sales@constructionos.com) can see 25 leads including assigned leads. Endpoint correctly filters by assigned_to OR unassigned.

sales_dashboard_counts.details: Sales dashboard shows 25 total leads with correct stage counts: New Appointment (14), Follow-up (2), Discussion (1), Site Visit Client Land (1), RE-From Planning (1), Negotiation (1), Project Onboarded (2).

presales_user_sees_leads.details: Pre-Sales user can see 500 leads (own + unassigned). Endpoint correctly filters by assigned_to OR unassigned.

presales_dashboard_all_stages.details: Pre-Sales dashboard shows all 7 stages: New Lead (913), Contacted (0), RNR (0), New RNR Leads (0), Portfolio sent (0), Follow-up (2), Appointment Booked (18).

multiple_transfers_round_robin.details: 4 Pre-Sales leads transferred to Sales with round-robin: Transfer 1 → Divya Pillai, Transfer 2 → Ravi Sales, Transfer 3 → Divya Pillai, Transfer 4 → Ravi Sales.

access_control_refresh.details: Non-admin users (CRE) correctly denied access to POST /api/marketing/distribution-settings/refresh (403 Forbidden).

access_control_get_settings.details: Non-admin users (CRE) correctly denied access to GET /api/marketing/distribution-settings (403 Forbidden).

seed_data_creation: Created test leads with prefix TEST_RR_Lead_, TEST_Transfer_, TEST_MultiTransfer_ for round-robin testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round-robin lead assignment working correctly. Pre-Sales team: Kavitha Nair, Karthik Reddy. Sales team: Ravi Sales, Divya Pillai. Pre-Sales → Sales transfer creates new lead in 'New Appointment' stage with round-robin assignment. Both Pre-Sales and Sales users can see their assigned leads + unassigned leads. All 7 Pre-Sales stages visible including 'New RNR Leads'.
features_tested: POST /api/marketing/distribution-settings/refresh - Refreshes team lists from users collection
GET /api/marketing/distribution-settings - Returns current distribution settings with team details
Round-robin Pre-Sales assignment: CRE creates leads, leads alternate between pre_sales team members
Round-robin Sales transfer: Pre-Sales lead moved to 'Appointment Booked' creates Sales lead with round-robin assignment
Sales user visibility: GET /api/crm/sales/leads returns assigned + unassigned leads
Sales dashboard: GET /api/crm/sales/dashboard includes all leads for sales users
Pre-Sales user visibility: GET /api/crm/pre-sales/leads returns own + unassigned leads
Pre-Sales dashboard: GET /api/crm/pre-sales/dashboard shows all stages including 'New RNR Leads'
Access control: Non-admin users denied access to distribution settings endpoints
